description_long: This is a tall, rectangular office building with a modern, minimalist facade dominated by a grid of evenly spaced windows. The exterior is primarily white with vertical blue accents running along the edges and between window columns, giving it a clean and contemporary appearance. The lower portion of the building features a glass-fronted lobby or commercial area, distinguished by larger window panels and a darker base. The roof is flat and slightly overhangs the main structure, adding to the geometric simplicity. The building's facade is highly regular, with identical window rows and columns, and the entrance is set within the glassy ground floor. No visible signage or decorative elements are present, emphasizing a functional, International Style design.
description: A tall, white office building with blue vertical accents and a grid of uniform windows, featuring a glassy ground-floor lobby and a flat roof.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full grid of windows, blue vertical accents, and the glassy ground-floor entrance area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the building's depth, blue edge accents, and the continuation of the window pattern.
description_view_2: Rear or alternate front view, similar to view 0 but with a small dark section at the ground floor corner.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, showing the building's depth and the glassy ground floor wrapping around the corner.
attribute_window_pattern: Uniform horizontal rows and vertical columns of rectangular windows, evenly spaced and repeated across all visible facades.
